concert_singer.question: Show the name and the release year of the song by the youngest singer.
concert_singer.bad_sql: SELECT Song_Name, Song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY Age ASC LIMIT 1

concert_singer.question: What are the names and release years for all the songs of the youngest singer?
concert_singer.bad_sql: SELECT Song_Name, Song_release_year FROM singer WHERE Singer_ID = (SELECT Singer_ID FROM singer ORDER BY Age ASC LIMIT 1)

concert_singer.question: Show countries where a singer above age 40 and a singer below 30 are from.
concert_singer.bad_sql: SELECT country FROM singer WHERE age > 40 INTERSECT SELECT country FROM singer WHERE age < 30

pets_1.question: Find the type and weight of the youngest pet.
pets_1.bad_sql: SELECT PetType, weight FROM Pets ORDER BY pet_age ASC LIMIT 1

pets_1.question: What type of pet is the youngest animal, and how much does it weigh?
pets_1.bad_sql: SELECT PetType, weight FROM Pets ORDER BY pet_age ASC LIMIT 1

car_1.question: What model has the most different versions?
car_1.bad_sql: SELECT Model FROM model_list GROUP BY Model ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

car_1.question: For model volvo, how many cylinders does the car with the least accelerate have?
car_1.bad_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CylinderCount FROM cars_data JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId WHERE Make = 'volvo' ORDER BY Accelerate ASC LIMIT 1

car_1.question: For a volvo model, how many cylinders does the version with least accelerate have?
car_1.bad_sql: SELECT MIN(cars_data.Cylinders) AS MinCylinders FROM car_names JOIN cars_data ON car_names.MakeId = cars_data.Id WHERE car_names.Make = 'volvo'

car_1.question: Which are the car makers which produce at least 2 models and more than 3 car makers ? List the id and the maker .
car_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.id, T1.maker FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.id, T1.maker HAVING COUNT(T2.Model) >= 2 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Model) DESC LIMIT 4

flight_2.question: How many United Airlines flights go to City 'Aberdeen'?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights WHERE Airline = (SELECT uid FROM airlines WHERE Airline = 'United Airlines') AND DestAirport IN (SELECT AirportCode FROM airports WHERE City = 'Aberdeen')

flight_2.question: Which city has most number of arriving flights?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.City FROM airports AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode = T2.DestAirport GROUP BY T1.City ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

flight_2.question: Which airlines have departures from CVO but not from APG airports?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline WHERE T2.SourceAirport = 'CVO' AND T2.DestAirport NOT IN (SELECT AirportCode FROM airports WHERE AirportName = 'APG')

flight_2.question: Find all airlines that have at least 10 flights.
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.uid HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10

flight_2.question: Find all airlines that have fewer than 200 flights.
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T2.Airline HAVING COUNT(*) < 200

flight_2.question: Which airlines have less than 200 flights?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING COUNT(T2.FlightNo) < 200

flight_2.question: What are flight numbers of flights arriving at Airport "APG"?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT FlightNo FROM flights WHERE DestAirport = 'APG'

flight_2.question: What are flight numbers of flights departing from City "Aberdeen "?
flight_2.bad_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.SourceAirport = T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City = 'Aberdeen'

museum_visit.question: What is the name of the museum that had no visitor yet?
museum_visit.bad_sql: SELECT Name FROM museum WHERE Museum_ID NOT IN (SELECT Museum_ID FROM visit)

museum_visit.question: Find the name and age of the visitor who bought the most tickets at once.
museum_visit.bad_sql: SELECT v.Name, v.Age FROM visitor v JOIN visit vi ON v.ID = vi.visitor_ID WHERE vi.Num_of_Ticket = (SELECT MAX(Num_of_Ticket) FROM visit)

wta_1.question: Find the number of left handed winners who participated in the WTA Championships.
wta_1.bad_sql: SELECT COUNT(winner_id) FROM matches JOIN players ON matches.winner_id = players.player_id WHERE winner_hand = 'L' AND tourney_name = 'WTA Championships'

battle_death.question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
battle_death.bad_sql: SELECT T1.id, T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN death AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING SUM(T2.killed) > 10

battle_death.question: List the name and date the battle that has lost the ship named 'Lettice' and the ship named 'HMS Atalanta'
battle_death.bad_sql: SELECT b.name, b.date FROM battle AS b JOIN ship AS s1 ON b.id = s1.lost_in_battle WHERE s1.name = 'Lettice' OR s1.name = 'HMS Atalanta'

student_transcripts_tracking.question: What are the descriptions for all the math courses?
student_transcripts_tracking.bad_sql: SELECT course_description FROM Courses WHERE course_name LIKE '%math%'

student_transcripts_tracking.question: For each semester, what is the name and id of the one with the most students registered?
student_transcripts_tracking.bad_sql: SELECT T1.semester_name, T1.semester_id FROM Semesters AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.semester_id = T2.semester_id GROUP BY T1.semester_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

student_transcripts_tracking.question: Show the date of the transcript which shows the least number of results, also list the id.
student_transcripts_tracking.bad_sql: SELECT transcript_date, transcript_id FROM Transcripts ORDER BY transcript_id ASC LIMIT 1

student_transcripts_tracking.question: What is the date and id of the transcript with the least number of results?
student_transcripts_tracking.bad_sql: SELECT T1.transcript_date, T1.transcript_id FROM transcripts AS T1 JOIN transcript_contents AS T2 ON T1.transcript_id = T2.transcript_id GROUP BY T1.transcript_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

tvshow.question: What is the name of the series that has the episode "A Love of a Lifetime"?
tvshow.bad_sql: SELECT t2.series_name FROM TV_series AS t1 JOIN TV_Channel AS t2 ON t2.id = t1.Channel WHERE t1.Episode = 'A Love of a Lifetime'

tvshow.question: What are the countries that are not playing cartoons written by Todd Casey?
tvshow.bad_sql: SELECT country FROM TV_Channel WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT channel FROM Cartoon WHERE written_by = 'Todd Casey')

tvshow.question: What are the ids of all tv channels that have more than 2 TV channels?
tvshow.bad_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

tvshow.question: find the package option of the tv channel that do not have any cartoon directed by Ben Jones.
tvshow.bad_sql: SELECT Package_Option FROM TV_Channel WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = 'Ben Jones' )

tvshow.question: What are the package options of all tv channels that are not playing any cartoons directed by Ben Jones?
tvshow.bad_sql: SELECT Package_Option FROM TV_Channel WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT Channel FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = 'Ben Jones' )

poker_player.question: What is the money rank of the tallest poker player?
poker_player.bad_sql: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1

poker_player.question: Return the money rank of the poker player with the greatest height.
poker_player.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Money_Rank FROM poker_player AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Height DESC LIMIT 1

voter_1.question: Return the names of the contestants whose names contain the substring 'Al' .
voter_1.bad_sql: SELECT DISTINCT contestant_name FROM CONTESTANTS WHERE contestant_name LIKE '%Al%'

world_1.question: What is the continent name which Anguilla belongs to?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Continent FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English'

world_1.question: Which cities are in European countries where English is not the official language?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code JOIN countrylanguage AS T3 ON T2.Code = T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.Continent = 'Europe' AND T3.Language = 'English' AND T3.IsOfficial = 'F'

world_1.question: Find the government form name and total population for each government form whose average life expectancy is longer than 72.
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.GovernmentForm, SUM(T1.Population) AS TotalPopulation FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode GROUP BY T1.GovernmentForm HAVING AVG(T1.LifeExpectancy) > 72

world_1.question: What are the different government forms and what is the total population of each for government forms that have an average life expectancy greater than 72?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.GovernmentForm, SUM(T1.Population) AS TotalPopulation FROM country AS T1 GROUP BY T1.GovernmentForm HAVING AVG(T1.LifeExpectancy) > 72

world_1.question: Give the language that is spoken in the most countries.
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT Language FROM countrylanguage WHERE IsOfficial = 'Yes' GROUP BY Language ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

world_1.question: What is the language spoken by the largest percentage of people in each country?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Name, T3.Language, T3.Percentage FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T3 ON T1.Code = T3.CountryCode WHERE T3.IsOfficial = 'T'

world_1.question: What is the total number of countries where Spanish is spoken by the largest percentage of people?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Code) FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'Spanish' AND T2.Percentage = (SELECT MAX(Percentage) FROM countrylanguage WHERE Language = 'Spanish')

world_1.question: Count the number of countries for which Spanish is the predominantly spoken language.
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode) FROM countrylanguage WHERE Language = 'Spanish' AND Percentage > 50

world_1.question: What are the codes of countries where Spanish is spoken by the largest percentage of people?
world_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.Code FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'Spanish' ORDER BY T2.Percentage DESC LIMIT 1

orchestra.question: Show the record companies shared by orchestras founded before 2003 and after 2003.
orchestra.bad_sql: SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra WHERE Year_of_Founded < 2003 INTERSECT SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra WHERE Year_of_Founded > 2003

orchestra.question: What are the record companies that are used by both orchestras founded before 2003 and those founded after 2003?
orchestra.bad_sql: SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra WHERE Year_of_Founded < 2003 INTERSECT SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra WHERE Year_of_Founded > 2003

network_1.question: Show me all grades that have at least 4 students.
network_1.bad_sql: SELECT grade FROM Highschooler GROUP BY grade HAVING COUNT(*) >= 4

network_1.question: Which grades have 4 or more high schoolers?
network_1.bad_sql: SELECT grade FROM Highschooler GROUP BY grade HAVING COUNT(*) >= 4

network_1.question: Show the names of students who have a grade higher than 5 and have at least 2 friends.
network_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM Highschooler AS T1 JOIN Friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.grade > 5 GROUP BY T1.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.friend_id) >= 2

network_1.question: What are the names of high schoolers who have a grade of over 5 and have 2 or more friends?
network_1.bad_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM Highschooler AS T1 JOIN Friend AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.student_id WHERE T1.grade > 5 GROUP BY T1.name HAVING COUNT(T2.friend_id) >= 2

dog_kennels.question: Which professionals live in the state of Indiana or have done treatment on more than 2 treatments? List his or her id, last name and cell phone.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT p.professional_id, p.last_name, p.cell_number FROM Professionals p WHERE p.state = 'Indiana' UNION SELECT t.professional_id, p.last_name, p.cell_number FROM Treatments t JOIN Professionals p ON t.professional_id = p.professional_id GROUP BY t.professional_id, p.last_name, p.cell_number HAVING COUNT(t.treatment_id) > 2

dog_kennels.question: Find the id, last name and cell phone of the professionals who live in the state of Indiana or have performed more than two treatments.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT T1.professional_id, T1.last_name, T1.cell_number FROM Professionals AS T1 LEFT JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id = T2.professional_id WHERE T1.state = 'Indiana' OR (T1.professional_id IN (SELECT professional_id FROM Treatments GROUP BY professional_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2))

dog_kennels.question: List each owner's first name, last name, and the size of his for her dog.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT O.first_name, O.last_name, S.size_description FROM Owners O JOIN Dogs D ON O.owner_id = D.owner_id JOIN Sizes S ON D.size_code = S.size_code

dog_kennels.question: List the names of the dogs of the rarest breed and the treatment dates of them.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT d.name, t.date_of_treatment FROM Dogs d JOIN Breeds b ON d.breed_code = b.breed_code JOIN Treatments t ON d.dog_id = t.dog_id WHERE b.breed_name IN ( SELECT breed_name FROM Breeds GROUP BY breed_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1 )

dog_kennels.question: Which dogs are of the rarest breed? Show their names and treatment dates.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT d.name, t.date_of_treatment FROM Dogs d JOIN Treatments t ON d.dog_id = t.dog_id WHERE d.breed_code IN ( SELECT breed_code FROM Dogs GROUP BY breed_code HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) ORDER BY t.date_of_treatment DESC

dog_kennels.question: List the last name of the owner owning the youngest dog.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT o.last_name FROM Owners o JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id ORDER BY d.date_of_birth DESC LIMIT 1

dog_kennels.question: Who owns the youngest dog? Give me his or her last name.
dog_kennels.bad_sql: SELECT o.last_name FROM Owners o JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id WHERE d.age = (SELECT MIN(age) FROM Dogs)

singer.question: Please show the most common citizenship of singers.
singer.bad_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

singer.question: What is the most common singer citizenship ?
singer.bad_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

singer.question: Show the citizenship shared by singers with birth year before 1945 and after 1955.
singer.bad_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year < 1945 OR Birth_Year > 1955

singer.question: What are the citizenships that are shared by singers with a birth year before 1945 and after 1955?

wrong_logic.question: Show the date of the transcript which shows the least number of results, also list the id.

wrong_logic.question: What are the ids of all tv channels that have more than 2 TV channels?

wrong_filter.question: Which dogs are of the rarest breed? Show their names and treatment dates.
